metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for apple-hig — design and review UIs to Apple's Human Interface Guidelines.

plugins.name: apple-hig
plugins.description: Automatically design and review UIs to Apple's Human Interface Guidelines (iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, tvOS, visionOS). Complete on-disk reference, a HIG design-reviewer subagent, and /hig-review, /hig-scaffold, /hig-tokens commands.
